name: Quaker's: Not-so-Sinful Brownies
recipeIngredient: 4 Egg whites or (2 eggs, slightly beaten)
1 cup Quaker Oats uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250°F.
2. Lightly spray the bottom of a 13 x 9-inch baking pan with non-stick cooking spray.
3. In a large saucepan, melt oil and chocolate over low heat, stirring frequently.
4. Remove from heat and stir in granulated sugar and applesauce until the sugar is dissolved.
5. Stir in egg whites and vanilla extract until completely blended.
6. Add combined oats, flour, baking powder, and salt; mix well.
7. Spread evenly into prepared pan.
8. Bake for 22 to 25 minutes or until edges pull away from sides of pan.
9. Cool completely before sprinkling with powdered sugar just before serving.
Nutrition Information: 1 brownie Calories 120, Calories From Fat 36, Total Fat 4g, Saturated Fat 1g, Cholesterol 0mg, Sodium 30mg, Total Carbohydrates 20g, Dietary Fiber 1g, Protein 2g.
